BreakEvenAnalysis.Context: Rough break-even for Osborne Metalworks studio ahead of the Dec 4 Turquoise Trail ship. Q3 materials line pending Xero corrected invoice. Uses canonical break-even template keys adapted for a solo silversmith studio (MembershipDues repurposed as recurring direct-commission subscribers, InstructorPay_Raj repurposed as contractor pay to Rafael Chavez, etc.).

CurrentState.Note: Q3 materials line uses Xero corrected value ($4,847.22). Fall bench-help pay to Rafael Chavez averaged as InstructorPay_Raj. Turquoise Trail + Red Earth holiday windows expected to lift the December + January months.

Scenario_A_RentTo750.Label: Rent line hypothetical - if home-office allocation for the workshop was reclassified as rent equivalent at $750/mo
Scenario_A_RentTo750.Impact: Not applicable to Sam's actual books - canonical scenario template retained for schema conformance.

Scenario_B_RentTo850.Label: Second rent hypothetical at $850/mo
Scenario_B_RentTo850.Impact: Not applicable to Sam's actual books - canonical scenario template retained for schema conformance.

BreakEvenAnalysis.KeyInsight: Studio break-even requires either the holiday windows landing at full contribution or an off-season direct commission stream. Q3 materials cost carried at Xero corrected value ($4,847.22) rather than QuickBooks stale value ($4,318.90).
